response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong TypeScript/Node.js web and full-stack engineer with broad experience across multiple domains, but he is fundamentally mismatched for this role. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly 7 months at National Instruments and a bachelor's thesis project — far below the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. He has no demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking systems, or related financial-domain infrastructure. His SQL experience is listed as a generic skill with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle. The optional desirable skills he does satisfy (CI/CD, Java) are insufficient to compensate for the absence of the two core mandatory requirements.
strengths: CI/CD pipeline experience (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory) aligns with one desirable qualification
Java background from robotic arm and mobile orchestration work at Altom satisfies one optional skill
Strong communication skills evidenced by public conference talks, multi-day workshops, and open-source community engagement
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~7 months at NI + one thesis project) versus the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows systems
Zero capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial-systems domain knowledge
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle; primary database experience is MongoDB and MySQL in web/SaaS contexts
